title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXII. Riddles.
content:
[A Hedgehog.]

        As I went over Lincoln bridge
        I met mister Rusticap;
        Pins and needles on his back,
        A going to Thorney fair.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXXII. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
